storage.notes: Add-on camera; no onboard microSD slot — recording is handled entirely by the paired Reolink NVR (officially grouped with the other add-on-only Reolink cameras that do not support microSD recording).

features: Reolink add-on PoE bullet 12MP NVR expansion
30m IR + color spotlight night vision (4.3W/6500K/700 lumens)
NVR-only — no standalone ONVIF/RTSP (same add-on architecture as B400/B500/B800; no dedicated B1200 FAQ found, but officially grouped with them)

frigate.notes: B1200 has no standalone RTSP/ONVIF service — it is an add-on camera that only works through a Reolink PoE NVR (e.g. RLN8-410, RLN16-410, or the NVR bundled with the RLK8-1200B4-A/RLK16-1200B8-A kits). Pull this camera's channel from the NVR's own RTSP stream instead of connecting to the camera's IP directly.

home_assistant.notes: Not directly discoverable — the camera has no local ONVIF/HTTP API or UID. Add the parent Reolink NVR to the Reolink HA integration instead; this camera's channel is exposed through the NVR.

blue_iris.notes: Cannot be added directly (no local ONVIF/RTSP). Add the parent Reolink NVR as the video source and pull this camera's channel from the NVR.
